recommendations.title: Runaway Train
recommendations.overview: A hardened convict and a younger prisoner escape from a brutal prison in the middle of winter only to find themselves on an out-of-control train with a female railway worker while being pursued by the vengeful head of security.

recommendations.title: Dear Comrades!
recommendations.overview: When the communist government raises food prices in 1962, the rebellious workers from the small industrial town of Novocherkassk go on strike. The massacre which then ensues is seen through the eyes of a devout party activist.

recommendations.title: Tango & Cash
recommendations.overview: Ray Tango and Gabriel Cash are two successful narcotics detectives who can't stand each other. Crime lord Yves Perret, furious at the loss of income they have caused him, plots an elaborate revenge against them.

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: The Snow Sister
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose grieving family has forgotten about Christmas forms an unexpected, healing bond with a bubbly girl full of holiday spirit.

recommendations.title: Descendants 2
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, TV Movie, Adventure, Music
recommendations.overview: When the pressure to be royal becomes too much for Mal, she returns to the Isle of the Lost where her archenemy Uma, Ursula's daughter, has taken her spot as self-proclaimed queen.
